text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How odd. I hypothesized that you would be able
to get at least one...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No, they say failure is the mother of success. This
is but the first step of many.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, let's move on to experimenting with my
newest concoction! This time, you'll enter a kind
of hypnotic state.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Agh! I forgot it in the laboratory... That's fine, we
can just go back!
